fact: Every Supabase query on a tenant-scoped table MUST include `.eq('tenant_id', tenantId)`. Tables without this filter expose data from ALL schools. Tenant-scoped tables include: students, staff, classes, sections, subjects, exams, assignments, attendance, fees, invoices, messages, events, and all feature-specific tables.
Demo credentials are hardcoded in LoginScreen: admin@school.com / admin123. These MUST be removed before production deployment. This is a known critical issue in CLAUDE.md.

tenantId from JWT appMetadata is NULL for super_admin users who manage across all tenants. Force-unwrapping `tenantId!` in BaseRepository crashes the app for super_admin. Always check for null and handle the super_admin case separately.
`generate_class_invoices()` RPC has no duplicate check. Calling it twice creates duplicate invoices. Add a check for existing invoices before calling or add a unique constraint at the DB level.
wallets.balance has a race condition in the trigger — concurrent debits can both pass the balance check and overdraft the wallet. Use SELECT FOR UPDATE or a server-side atomic operation.
hostel_rooms.occupied counter can desync if room assignment and counter update are done in separate transactions. Use an RPC or trigger to keep them in sync atomically.
All Supabase migrations must be idempotent. Use `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS`, `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS`, `ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS`. This allows safe re-runs without data loss.

New tables MUST have: (1) tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id), (2) Row Level Security enabled: `ALTER TABLE <name> ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY`, (3) RLS policy for tenant isolation, (4) Index on tenant_id for query performance.

Missing DB indexes that need adding: student name search (`students.full_name`), message sender (`messages.sender_id`), invoice due date (`invoices.due_date`). Queries on these columns are slow without indexes.

Supabase migrations live in `supabase/migrations/` as timestamped SQL files. Name them with `supabase migration new <description>` which creates `YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_<description>.sql`. Never hand-edit the timestamp.
students.payment_status is denormalized (duplicates invoice data). When creating/updating invoices, also update this field. Risk of staleness — prefer reading from invoices table for accuracy.

Attendance overwrite has no confirmation dialog — a teacher can overwrite existing attendance records without warning. KNOWN CRITICAL ISSUE. Always add confirmation before overwriting existing records.

Quiz timer runs client-side only — exploitable by pausing the app or manipulating device time. For assessed quizzes, store start_time on the server when quiz begins and validate submission time server-side.
